title: Minimum Cost To Change The Final Value Of Expression
description: Change one binary digit or one &/| operator per operation; return the minimum changes required to flip the value of the fully parenthesized-precedence expression. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: expression: str. expression length <=100000; characters are 0,1,&,|,(,); expression is valid; operators have equal precedence and evaluate left-to-right within parentheses.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
